prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock Lambda II RS 3.8L (G6DA/G6DK) naturally aspirated V6 with a forged internals build featuring Manley 4340 forged steel connecting rods, JE 9.5:1 compression ratio forged pistons, and ACL Race Series main/rod bearings to handle forced induction. Pair with a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) and a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel turbo-back exhaust system by Tomei, featuring a 304-grade stainless steel 76mm diameter piping and a 100-cell GReddy Revolution RS cat-back muffler for optimized spool and flow.

Fuel System: Upgrade to a full return-style fuel system with an Aeromotive A1000 fuel pump, ID1000x injectors (1000cc/min), and a Radium Engineering dual fuel pressure regulator. Integrate a Link G4+ Xtreme standalone ECU with a custom flex-fuel sensor and ethanol-compatible fuel lines (PTFE-lined) to support E85 blends, tuned by a specialist using a dyno-validated 450whp target map with closed-loop wideband O2 feedback (AEM X-Series 4-channel).

Drivetrain & Suspension: Install an OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2-way) in the 8.0-inch rear differential with upgraded axles (DSS 35-spline) and a Spec Stage 4+ twin-disc clutch with a billet flywheel. Replace the stock MacPherson strut front and multi-link rear suspension with a full Ohlins Road & Track DFV kit (coilovers), featuring 24-way adjustable compression/rebound damping, 30mm front/28mm rear sway bars (Hotchkis), and polyurethane bushings (Energy Suspension) for the subframe and control arms. Use Whiteline adjustable rear toe arms and front camber plates for alignment precision.
estetica: Aero: Fit a Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (Genesis Coupe-specific) with carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a duckbill rear spoiler. Pair with a custom carbon fiber front splitter by Seibon and a Varis-style rear diffuser (3D-printed PETG with aluminum supports). Use a custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap with gloss black accents on the hood, roof, and side skirts, applied by a certified installer using Xpel Stealth PPF for rock chip protection.

Wheels & Brakes: Mount a set of Volk Racing TE37V (19x9.5 +15 front, 19x10.5 +25 rear) in Hyper Silver with titanium hardware, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (265/35/19 front, 295/30/19 rear). Upgrade to a full Brembo GT-R big brake kit (380mm front rotors with 6-piston calipers, 355mm rear rotors with 4-piston calipers) and stainless steel braided brake lines (Goodridge).

Interior & Details: Replace the stock seats with Recaro SPG XL bucket seats (black Alcantara with red stitching) mounted on custom Bride seat rails. Install a full carbon fiber dashboard overlay (Seibon) with a custom gauge pod housing a Defi Advance BF series boost/fuel pressure/oil temp gauge cluster. Use a NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub with a Momo Mod.78 350mm suede wheel. Add a custom roll cage (Chassisworks 8-point bolt-in) with gusseted rear strut tower braces and a carbon fiber rear seat delete panel (Seibon) for weight reduction.
